title: Better Create
description:
Better Create expands your engineering dreams with advanced factory automation, trains, and jetpacks.
Explore a beautifully overhauled world optimized for seamless multiplayer with built-in voice chat!
body:
## ⚙️ Better Create
### The Definitive Engineering Experience

Welcome to Better Create, a meticulously crafted NeoForge experience that pushes the boundaries of kinetic engineering, aeronautics, and industrial automation. Built on the cutting-edge of Minecraft 1.21.1, this pack integrates the revolutionary Create Aeronautics, allowing you to break the chains of static bases and take your factory to the skies.

Whether you are a master architect, a logistics genius, or an aerial explorer, Better Create provides the tools to automate everything and conquer every horizon.

## ✨ Main Features
### ✈️ The Dawn of Aeronautics

The centerpiece of this pack. With Create Aeronautics, physics-based flight is finally here. Construct massive airships, custom planes, and mobile fortresses that move dynamically through the world. 

### 🏭 Industrial Supremacy

Go beyond basic rotational power. Harness the power of Diesel Generators, refine Liquid Fuels, and expand your production lines with The Factory Must Grow and Ultimate Factory. From automated kitchens via Slice & Dice to massive resource generation with Renewable Netherite, your industrial potential is limitless.

### 🎨 Architectural Precision

Building a factory is an art form. Utilize a massive palette of decorative mods including Create Deco, Design n' Decor, Interiors, and Copycats+. With Rechiseled and Fusion (Connected Textures), your builds will look seamless, professional, and breathtaking.

### 🌍 A World Worth Exploring

Venture into a stunning landscape powered by Oh The Biomes We've Gone and Oh The Trees You'll Grow. Discover hidden Stoneholm underground villages, brave the terrors of the Deep Dark, or dive into Aquatic Ambitions. Every journey is supported by Xaero’s Maps and Nature's Compass.

### ⚡ Performance

Experience Minecraft like never before. Better Create is optimized with the ultimate performance suite: Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, ImmediatelyFast, and Entity Culling. High framerates are guaranteed, even in the heart of your most complex machinery.

### Key Mods

| Category         | Key Mods                                                        |
|------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------|
| Core Tech        | Create, Enchantment Industry, Crafts & Additions, Connected     |
| Power & Industry | Diesel Generators, Liquid Fuel, The Factory Must Grow           |
| Logistics        | Tom's Simple Storage, Ender Transmission, Contraption Terminals |
| Aviation         | Create Aeronautics, Create Jetpack, Hypertubes                  |
| Exploration      | OTBiomesWG, Stoneholm, Create: Deep Dark                        |
| Quality of Life  | Jade, JEI, AppleSkin, Mouse Tweaks                              |

Ready to redefine gravity? Strap on your Create Goggles, fire up the engines, and start building the future today in Better Create!

## Work in Progress:

I am working on Quests that guide trough the Modpack. I'm also working on a whole new End Game progression with a specific goal for this pack. You can excpect it to come out in august 2026.
